/home/demma/.local/bin/pspdev/bin/psp-g++ -I/home/demma/.local/bin/pspdev/psp/include -I/home/demma/.local/bin/pspdev/psp/sdk/include -DPSP -L/home/demma/.local/bin/pspdev/lib -L/home/demma/.local/bin/pspdev/psp/lib -L/home/demma/.local/bin/pspdev/psp/sdk/lib -Wl,-zmax-page-size=128 "CMakeFiles/tank-fun.dir/main.cpp.obj" "CMakeFiles/tank-fun.dir/inc/audio.c.obj" "CMakeFiles/tank-fun.dir/inc/graphics.c.obj" "CMakeFiles/tank-fun.dir/inc/math.c.obj" "CMakeFiles/tank-fun.dir/inc/sprites.c.obj" "CMakeFiles/tank-fun.dir/game/game.cpp.obj" "CMakeFiles/tank-fun.dir/game/level.cpp.obj" "CMakeFiles/tank-fun.dir/entity/bomb.cpp.obj" "CMakeFiles/tank-fun.dir/entity/bullet.cpp.obj" "CMakeFiles/tank-fun.dir/entity/entity.cpp.obj" "CMakeFiles/tank-fun.dir/entity/explode.cpp.obj" "CMakeFiles/tank-fun.dir/entity/plane.cpp.obj" "CMakeFiles/tank-fun.dir/entity/player.cpp.obj" -o tank-fun  -lpspdebug -lpspdisplay -lpspge -lpspgu -lpspctrl -lpspaudio -lpspaudiolib -lpspatrac3
